  "decision": "fail",

  "percent_complete": 50,

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Cords routed across active walkways creating trip hazards",
    "Missing guardrails on elevated work platforms",
    "Blocked emergency egress routes and fire extinguishers",
    "Improvised, non-engineered scaffold structures in use",
    "Unattended and unguarded open floor holes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately under Stop Work Authority (SWA)",
    "Reroute or protect cords using heavy-duty cord ramps or overhead hangers",
    "Install compliant guardrail systems including top rails, mid rails, and toe boards",
    "Clear all obstructions from emergency egress paths and fire extinguisher access zones",
    "Dismantle improvised scaffolds and replace with engineered, inspected scaffolding",
    "Cover and secure, or barricade and label, all open floor holes"
  ],
  "rationale": "The jobsite exhibits multiple severe, life-threatening safety violations including fall hazards, egress blockages, and structural instability of work platforms. These conditions violate basic OSHA standards and present an immediate danger to life and health (IDLH), requiring an immediate stop-work order and corrective actions before work can resume.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA General Duty Clause Section 5(a)(1)",
    "29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (Scaffolds)",
    "29 CFR 1926.501 (Duty to have fall protection)",
    "29 CFR 1926.25 (Housekeeping)",
    "29 CFR 1926.34 (Means of egress)"
  ]
}
